text:
A lonely man lived in a village. His house was large and comfortable, but he felt lonely. Every evening, he would sit by the window, watching the stars slowly fade as darkness enveloped the land.

One night, he heard a soft tapping on his window. Curious, he opened it to find a tiny, shimmering creature. It was the Teardrop fairy, one of his village's enchantresses. They shared tales until dawn. From that day on, the man didn't feel so lonely. The Teardrop fairy came every night, until she was caught by a hunter one moonlit night—a story passed down till this day, a reminder that sometimes magic finds its way to the ordinary world.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
